name: Butter Cream Banded Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
Butter cream: Combine cream cheese, egg, and sugar in a medium mixing bowl. Beat on high until smooth. Gradually add 2 tablespoons of milk, the butter, cornstarch, and vanilla extract. Add another tablespoon of milk if needed to achieve a smooth consistency. Set aside.
Cake: Melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler and let cool. Cream butter and gradually add 2 cups sugar, beating continuously. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Alternating with milk, beginning and ending with flour mixture, add to the creamed mixture, mixing well after each addition. Stir in melted chocolate and vanilla. Spread half of the chocolate batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan. Spoon reserved buttercream mixture over the chocolate batter. Top with remaining chocolate batter. Bake at 350°F until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely in pan on a wire rack.
Frosting: Combine chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil, reduce heat to low, and cook while stirring until chocolate and butter have melted. Remove from heat. Let cool. Add powdered sugar and half of the milk, beating at medium speed. Add vanilla and additional milk as needed to achieve spreading consistency. Spread on cooled cake.
